sub_modules.aes_sbox: Combinational AES S-box lookup table (256x8) used for SubBytes and key expansion SubWord.
sub_modules.aes_key_expand_round: Computes the next 128-bit round key from the previous round key and round constant (RotWord, SubWord, Rcon XOR, and word XOR chain).
sub_modules.aes_mixcolumns: Combinational GF(2^8) MixColumns transform on a single 32-bit column.
sub_modules.aes_round_func: Full AES round: SubBytes + ShiftRows + (optional) MixColumns + AddRoundKey, parameterized for last round (no MixColumns).
